content: EF Core Global Query Filters for multi-tenancy: store tenant ID in DbContext constructor as a captured field (e.g. _tenant = service.Tenant), then reference it in OnModelCreating via HasQueryFilter(e => e.TenantId == _tenant). EF Core 10 supports named filters (HasQueryFilter('TenantFilter', ...)) allowing selective disable via IgnoreQueryFilters(['TenantFilter']). DbContext must be Scoped lifetime. Caution: required navigation with INNER JOIN can filter out parents when child entity has a filter — use optional navigation or apply matching filters on both sides. Filters can only be defined on root entity of inheritance hierarchy.
